tasks.prompt:
You are monitoring a background Ralph task. Check the following and update a status report:

1. Read the latest 200 lines from: /private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-leo-Desktop-puhuikouq/42291d0f-c4c2-48a2-bc40-90f24cdcaaf9/tasks/bxbcw88pa.output
2. Read /Users/leo/Desktop/puhuikouq/scripts/ralph/progress.txt
3. Check if Ralph process is still running: ps aux | grep -E "(ralph|claude)" | grep -v grep
4. Check latest commits: cd /Users/leo/Desktop/puhuikouq && git log --oneline -10
5. Check US-002 onwards completion status from prd.json
6. Write a concise status report to /Users/leo/Desktop/puhuikouq/RALPH_STATUS.md with:
   - Current time
   - Which iteration is running
   - Which user stories are completed (from prd.json)
   - Any errors or blockers observed
   - Estimated next milestone

If Ralph has completed all tasks (all passes: true in prd.json or <promise>COMPLETE</promise> found in output), celebrate and recommend the user review progress.txt and the commits.
If Ralph seems stuck (same iteration for >30 min with no file changes), note it clearly.
